title: Cheese.
description: Replaces one of the vanilla paintings with a timeless masterpiece.
body:
### What does this do?
Replaces "The Stage is Set" (spider painting) with a timeless masterpiece adapted into Minecraft.


### Why does this exist?
This was painted using [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting), and subsequently made into a resource pack when I lost the original. It was a dark day on my SMP when it was lost, but now it lives on!
